title: Supporting the Villages: Implementing Community-Based Strategies to Promote Maternal Health in Arizona
authors_full: Jocelyn Magana, BS, Arizona State University; #Lakisa Muhammad, CPM, LM, Black Birth Equity Now; #Kimberly Moore Salas, IBCLC, Tribal Indemnity; Megan Blease, BA, Arizona State University; Cinthia Martinez, BA, Arizona State University; *Gideon Owusu, MD, MPH, Arizona State University; Claire Reynolds, BA, BS, Arizona State University; *Catalina Cortes, MS, Arizona State University; Cady Berkel, PhD, Arizona State University
authors_short: Jocelyn Magana Arizona State University et al.

summary.hook: Arizona has major racial/ethnic and geographic disparities in pregnancy-associated mortality, with high mortality ratios and many deaths deemed preventable.
summary.summary_30s: Arizona has major racial/ethnic and geographic disparities in pregnancy-associated mortality, with high mortality ratios and many deaths deemed preventable.

talktrack_2m.what_this_is_about: Arizona has major racial/ethnic and geographic disparities in pregnancy-associated mortality, with high mortality ratios and many deaths deemed preventable.
talktrack_2m.what_they_did: Implementation / community-engaged qualitative (listening sessions) plus implementation strategy development (Phase II). Phase I: 15 sessions; 70 participants; 23 doulas
talktrack_2m.what_they_found: Arizona pregnancy-associated mortality ratio reached 91.2 deaths per 100,000 live births in 2018–2019 (text).
talktrack_2m.why_it_matters: Implementation barriers for doula/perinatal support integration may be addressed by bundling strategies across reimbursement/economic feasibility, training/workforce preparation...
talktrack_2m.one_smart_follow_up: How do you define a “village” in this project, and how many villages were involved in Phase I?

takeaways: Arizona pregnancy-associated mortality ratio reached 91.2 deaths per 100,000 live births in 2018–2019 (text).
Nearly 90% of deaths were determined to be preventable (text).
Implementation barriers for doula/perinatal support integration may be addressed by bundling strategies across reimbursement/economic feasibility, training/workforce...
